name: AI Marketing Platform PRD
description: Enterprise AI Marketing Platform with content creation, lead management, and workflow automation

userStories.title: System Infrastructure Setup
userStories.description:
Set up the complete project infrastructure including:
1. Next.js 15 frontend with TypeScript
2. Authentication system (JWT)
3. Database schema
4. API routes structure

userStories.title: Content Generation Module
userStories.description:
Implement AI-powered marketing content generation for:
1. Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) posts
2. Zhihu articles
3. WeChat public account content
4. Multi-platform adaptation
acceptanceCriteria: Content generation API returns formatted content

userStories.title: Enterprise RBAC System
userStories.description:
Implement role-based access control with 6 roles:
1. Super Admin - Full system access
2. Enterprise Admin - Enterprise management
3. Department Admin - Department management
4. Reviewer - Content approval
5. Creator - Content creation
6. Guest - Limited access

userStories.title: Lead Management Integration
userStories.description:
Implement lead management with n8n/Dify workflow integration (mock):
1. Lead capture form and API
2. Lead scoring system (mock algorithm)
3. CRM integration via n8n/Dify webhook (mock)
4. Email generation for leads (mock)

userStories.title: Website Generator Integration
userStories.description:
Implement website generator with third-party API integration (mock):
1. Template selection UI
2. Multi-language support (EN, ZH, JA, KO)
3. Content integration API
4. Website export/deploy API (mock third-party service)

userStories.title: Enterprise Strategy Consultant
userStories.description:
Implement AI consultant with n8n/Dify workflow integration (mock):
1. Knowledge base upload and indexing (mock)
2. Semantic search API
3. AI Q&A endpoint via Dify workflow (mock)
4. Source citation in responses
acceptanceCriteria: Q&A endpoint returns mock AI responses

userStories.title: Training Materials Integration
userStories.description:
Implement training materials with third-party API integration (mock):
1. PPT presentation generation API (mock)
2. Video tutorial creation API (mock)
3. Quiz generation API
4. Progress tracking dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: PPT generation endpoint returns mock response
Video creation endpoint returns mock response

userStories.title: Integration and Testing
userStories.description:
Complete integration and comprehensive testing:
1. All modules integrated
2. API documentation complete
3. Basic E2E tests pass
4. Performance benchmarks met

userStories.title: Deployment and Launch
userStories.description:
Deploy to production:
1. Environment configuration
2. CI/CD pipeline configured
3. Monitoring and alerting set up
4. Documentation complete

metadata.note: Multi-agent video generation removed. External integrations use mock services.
